message:
fix(runtime): Add PyException-compatible fields to ExceptionClass

Add type_name, message, and exception_id instance fields to ExceptionClass
so that raise X from cause can access them through pointers. This fixes
compilation errors when a variable like `cause = KeyError()` is used as
an exception cause in `raise IndexError from cause`.

Previously, the codegen tried to access cause.type_name etc. but
ExceptionClass only had these as pub const declarations which can't
be accessed through instance pointers in Zig.
